meta.title: Artlyo — Art marketplace from Latvia
meta.description: Discover and collect original art from Baltic and European creators. Born in Latvia, open to the world.

hero.badge: Born in Latvia · Art from the Baltics
hero.title: Where artists meet collectors
hero.subtitle: Artlyo is a curated marketplace for painters, sculptors, photographers, and digital creators. Discover original works, connect with artists, and bring art into your space.

home.featuredSubtitle: Handpicked pieces from our founding artists
home.artistsSubtitle: Creators from Latvia and across Europe
home.step1Desc: Browse original artworks by category, style, and price. All listings in EUR.
home.step2Desc: Send a purchase inquiry directly to the artist. No hidden fees on browsing.
home.step3Desc: Arrange payment and delivery with the artist. Secure checkout coming soon.
home.ctaSubtitle: We're inviting the first 50 creators to list for free. Be part of Artlyo from day one.

inquiry.title: Purchase inquiry
inquiry.subtitle: Your message goes directly to the artist. They will respond within 2–3 business days.
inquiry.name: Your name
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: I'm interested in this piece. Could you tell me about shipping to…
inquiry.successDesc: Thank you. The artist will contact you at the email you provided.
inquiry.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auctions.title: Live auctions
auctions.subtitle: Bid on exclusive pieces — full auction engine launching soon
auctions.comingSoon: Live bidding launches in Phase 2. Join our waitlist by sending an inquiry on any artwork.

sell.title: Sell your art on Artlyo
sell.subtitle: Reach collectors across Europe. List your work in minutes.
sell.benefit1Desc: Your profile, your story. We take 10% only when you sell.
sell.benefit2Desc: Built for Baltic creators, open to artists worldwide.
sell.benefit3Desc: Upload works, set prices in EUR, receive inquiries directly.
sell.benefit4Desc: Auctions, analytics, and Stripe checkout on the roadmap.
sell.name: Full name
sell.successDesc: We'll review your application and get back within 5 business days.

about.title: About Artlyo
about.missionDesc: Artlyo helps independent artists and cultural creators reach a global audience. Born in Riga, Latvia, we believe the Baltic art scene deserves a dedicated home — not buried in generic marketplaces.
about.visionDesc: We're building more than a shop. Artlyo will offer auctions, artist analytics, multi-language support, and expansion into adjacent creative verticals — all on one platform.
about.latviaDesc: Latvia has a rich tradition of visual art, design, and craft. Artlyo starts here, with EUR pricing and support in English, Latvian, Russian, German, and Norwegian.
about.roadmap1: MVP launch — browse, profiles, purchase inquiries
about.contactDesc: Partnerships, press, or investor inquiries: hello@artlyo.com

footer.mvpNote: MVP preview — some features are simulated for demonstration.
